task.title: Repair Map Structures
task.shortdesc: Repair map structure issues that prevent deterministic main-map selection and stable relationship extraction.

prereq.p: Generate discovery.json and review map artifact classifications.

step.cmd: Inspect map classifications and confidence scores.

info.codeblock: jq '.artifacts[] | select(.artifact_type=="map") | {path, classification, confidence, metadata}' build/discovery.json

info.p: If discovery cannot resolve a single main map consistently, adjust source map structure or add plugin patterns that identify the intended entry map deterministically.

step.cmd: Validate relationship integrity for map references and topic references.

info.codeblock: jq '.relationships[] | select(.source | endswith(".ditamap")) | {source, type, target}' build/discovery.json

step.cmd: Regenerate planning input and plan after map corrections.

info.codeblock: python3 -m dita_package_processor normalize --input build/discovery.json --output build/planning_input.json python3 -m dita_package_processor plan --input build/planning_input.json --output build/plan.json

result.p: Map structure supports deterministic planning and stable plan generation across repeated runs.
result.codeblock: planning_input.json contains one main_map plan generation succeeds without main-map ambiguity errors
